ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., sensor, actuator) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the device was last updated */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Hardware version of the device */,
  "activation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was activated */,
  "deactivation_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was deactivated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Access type (e.g., R, W, R/W) */,
  "multiple_instances" TEXT /* Whether the resource supports multiple instances */,
  "mandatory" INTEGER /* Whether the resource is mandatory */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the resource (e.g., String, Boolean, Integer) */,
  "range_enumeration" TEXT /* Range or enumeration of valid values */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device to which the resource belongs */,
  "resource_group" TEXT /* Group to which the resource belongs (e.g., configuration, monitoring) */,
  "resource_category" TEXT /* Category of the resource (e.g., temperature, pressure, humidity) */,
  "data_precision" INTEGER /* Precision of the resource data */,
  "data_scale" INTEGER /* Scale of the resource data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource instance */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource to which the instance belongs */,
  "instance_data" TEXT /* Data value of the resource instance */,
  "instance_status" TEXT /* Current status of the resource instance (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the resource instance was last updated */,
  "instance_created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the resource instance */,
  "instance_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the resource instance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_instances_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource to which the data belongs */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the resource at a specific timestamp */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., device, user, API) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_data_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator, developer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device to which the command belongs */,
  "command" TEXT /* The command to be executed on the device */,
  "command_status" TEXT /* Status of the command (e.g., pending, in_progress, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the command */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the command was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_commands_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_commands_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device to which the notification belongs */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., error, warning, info) */,
  "message" TEXT /* The notification message */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
